_comment: CANONICAL CTA LEXICON (founder, changeover step 6). Battery check `cta-lexicon` enforces: every rendered button's visible text is canonical, sanctioned, or a fenced intents.json cta value. New entries require a founder ruling.

sanctioned.role: contact form submit — baseline-equity label (live contract)
partner funnel primary — founder ruling round 9 (partner-apply)
partner funnel secondary — founder ruling round 9 (partner-question)
nav-card / secondary label only — founder ruling round-12 audit; NOT a primary btn (canonical primary stays 'Book the discovery call')
find-an-accountant hub state-router button — founder ruling 2026-06-17 (state selector routes to the chosen state's page)

_machinery_note: intents.json per-intent `cta` values swap the form submit label at runtime — fenced machinery, treated as sanctioned by the battery check.
